config.service_file:
# /etc/systemd/system/verv-dashboard.service
[Unit]
Description=Verv Banksia OS Dashboard
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=root
WorkingDirectory=/root/banksia-dashboard
ExecStart=/usr/local/lib/hermes-agent/venv/bin/gunicorn -w 4 -k gthread --threads 4 --worker-connections 40 --max-requests 10000 --max-requests-jitter 1000 --timeout 60 --graceful-timeout 30 -b 127.0.0.1:5050 app:app
Restart=always
RestartSec=5
StandardOutput=journal
StandardError=journal
LimitNOFILE=65536

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

config.traefik_config:
http:
  routers:
    dashboard:
      rule: "Host(`ops.srv1744186.hstgr.cloud`)"
      entrypoints: websecure
      tls:
        certresolver: letsencrypt
      service: dashboard
    bridge-routes:
      rule: "Host(`ops.srv1744186.hstgr.cloud`) && PathPrefix(`/bridge/`)"
      entrypoints: websecure
      tls:
        certresolver: letsencrypt
      middlewares:
        - strip-bridge
      service: codex-bridge
    showcase:
      rule: "Host(`showcase.srv1744186.hstgr.cloud`)"
      entrypoints: websecure
      tls:
        certresolver: letsencrypt
      service: showcase
    showcase-path:
      rule: "Host(`ops.srv1744186.hstgr.cloud`) && PathPrefix(`/showcase`)"
      entrypoints: websecure
      tls:
        certresolver: letsencrypt
      middlewares:
        - strip-showcase
      service: showcase
    neo-health:
      rule: "Host(`health.srv1744186.hstgr.cloud`)"
      entrypoints: websecure
      tls:
        certresolver: letsencrypt
      service: neo-health
  middlewares:
    strip-showcase:
      stripPrefix:
        prefixes:
          - "/showcase"
    strip-bridge:
      stripPrefix:
        prefixes:
          - "/bridge"
  services:
    dashboard:
      loadBalancer:
        healthCheck:
          path: "/health"
          interval: "30s"
          timeout: "5s"
        servers:
          - url: "http://127.0.0.1:5050"
    showcase:
      loadBalancer:
        servers:
          - url: "http://127.0.0.1:5052"
    neo-health:
      loadBalancer:
        servers:
          - url: "http://127.0.0.1:5053"
    codex-bridge:
      loadBalancer:
        servers:
          - url: "http://127.0.0.1:5054"
